title: zinnia angustifolia
intro: Zinnia angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved zinnia, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Zinnia angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Zinnia angustifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
